$comment: scripts/PewterGym.asm PewterGymBrockText — the challenge (pre text -> the OPP_BROCK fight), the win chain (the badge's sound_level_up quirk, BOULDERBADGE, BEAT_BROCK + the gym's trainers marked defeated (gh #109), the badge lecture, the 'Wait! Take this!' beat, TM34), and the post-battle advice line once beaten. give_item's full-bag abort IS pokered's GiveItem .BagFull: the badge stands, the TM is permanently forfeited, no re-offer (gh #174).

then.text:
There are all
kinds of trainers
in the world! You appear to be
very gifted as a
POKéMON trainer! Go to the GYM in
CERULEAN and test
your abilities!

else.text:
I'm BROCK!
I'm PEWTER's GYM
LEADER! I believe in rock
hard defense and
determination! That's why my
POKéMON are all
the rock-type! Do you still want
to challenge me?
Fine then! Show
me your best!

then.text:
I took
you for granted. As proof of your
victory, here's
the BOULDERBADGE! {player} received
the BOULDERBADGE!

That's an official
POKéMON LEAGUE
BADGE! Its bearer's
POKéMON become
more powerful! The technique
FLASH can now be
used any time!

A TM contains a
technique that
can be taught to
POKéMON! A TM is good only
once! So when you
use one to teach
a new technique,
pick the POKéMON
carefully! TM34 contains
BIDE! Your POKéMON will
absorb damage in
battle then pay
it back double!
